title: Pouteria ulei
taxonomy: Pouteria ulei is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It belongs to the genus Pouteria, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The Sapotaceae family is a part of the order Ericales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The Ericales order is further classified under the clade Pentapetalae, which includes many flowering plant families. Pouteria ulei is a member of this complex and diverse taxonomic classification.

intro: Pouteria ulei, also known as Ulei's Sapote, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic effects, making it a valuable resource for indigenous communities. The bioactive constituents of Pouteria ulei include alkaloids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
